cards.name: Poison
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: Block
cards.actionEffect: Engage a selected enemy army in this hex (no additional effect yet).

cards.name: AFriendOrThree
cards.actionEffect: Claim the unowned, gently sway the uncertain, and if a capital still remembers old oaths, try to bring its ruler to your side.

cards.name: AssassinateCharacter
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to assassinate an enemy character.

cards.name: Kidnap Character
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to kidnap an enemy character. Captives drain 1 gold per turn from their original nation and may escape.
